name: Federal Aviation Administration
description: The FAA is the national aviation authority of the United States, responsible for the regulation and oversight of civil aviation.

name: Transport Canada Civil Aviation
description: Transport Canada regulates civil aviation safety and security across Canada.

name: Civil Aviation Authority
description: The UK CAA is the statutory corporation which oversees and regulates all aspects of civil aviation in the UK.

name: European Union Aviation Safety Agency
description: EASA is the European Union agency for aviation safety, providing uniform safety rules across EU member states.

name: Directorate General of Civil Aviation
description: DGCA is the regulatory body for civil aviation in India, responsible for safety oversight of civil aviation requirements.

name: Civil Aviation Safety Authority
description: CASA is the government body that regulates civil aviation safety in Australia and the safety of Australian aircraft operating overseas.

name: General Civil Aviation Authority
description: GCAA is the regulatory authority responsible for civil aviation oversight in the UAE.

name: Agência Nacional de Aviação Civil
description: ANAC is the Brazilian civil aviation authority, responsible for the certification of aviation products and services.

name: Japan Civil Aviation Bureau
description: JCAB oversees all civil aviation matters in Japan including licensing, airworthiness, and air traffic management.

name: Civil Aviation Administration of China
description: CAAC is the governmental body responsible for civil aviation in the People's Republic of China.

name: South African Civil Aviation Authority
description: SACAA regulates civil aviation in South Africa, ensuring safe, orderly, and efficient aviation operations.

name: Civil Aviation Authority of Singapore
description: CAAS develops and regulates a safe, efficient and competitive civil aviation sector in Singapore.
